violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025
Water observed in stacks of food containers in clean area. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators, glove rack, carts, and shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

The floors throughout the establishment including the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Beef was observed held at 124 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Beef was reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Scoop observed stored on an unclean surface (top of ingredient bin) between uses. Spoon observed stored between wall and rack at 3 bay sink. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators, ingredient bins, storage bins, knife rack, and some shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The floor in the walk in cooler have an cumulation of trash and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
Partition for handwashing sink located at the cookline area was in poor repair. Per PIC, work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2024
Refuse areas were observed with an accumulation of trash and litter. Area to be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
